# Golang Docker Images

Last generated: 2026-06-20

Images are published to:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/golang
```

For this repository, `ghcr.io/<owner>/<repo>/golang` resolves to
`ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/golang`.

The workflow builds every pinned Go version for both `linux/amd64` and
`linux/arm64`.

## Variants

| Variant | Base image | Tags | Contents |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `full` | `debian:bookworm-slim` | `latest`, `1.26`, `1.26.4` | Go plus common build tools: Git, SSH client, C/C++ compilers, Make, curl, and pkg-config. |
| `alpine` | `alpine:latest` | `latest-alpine`, `1.26-alpine`, `1.26.4-alpine` | Smaller Alpine image with Go and the minimum install/download tooling. |

## Tag Rules

For each exact version, CI publishes both variants:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/golang:<version>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/golang:<version>-alpine
```

The newest patch in each Go line also gets minor aliases:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/golang:<major>.<minor>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/golang:<major>.<minor>-alpine
```

The newest resolved stable Go version also gets latest aliases:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/golang:latest
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/golang:latest-alpine
```

Commit-specific tags are published as:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/golang:<version>-<sha>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/golang:<version>-alpine-<sha>
```

## Status Meanings

Go's release policy supports a release line until there are two newer release
lines. See the official policy at <https://go.dev/doc/devel/release#policy>.

| Status | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| Current | Newest pinned Go patch on the newest supported release line. Prefer this for new work. |
| Supported | Newest pinned Go patch on another currently supported release line. Acceptable when you cannot move to current yet. |
| Superseded | Older patch in a supported release line. The image exists for reproducibility, but new builds should move to that line's newest patch. |
| Deprecated | Release line is no longer supported by the Go project. Keep only for legacy rebuilds. |

As of 2026-06-20, the supported Go lines in this repository are
`1.26` and `1.25`. Older lines are deprecated.

## Build Schedule

CI/CD runs on pushes, pull requests, manual dispatch, and every Monday at
00:00 UTC. The scheduled run refreshes `generic/golang/versions.yml` from the Go
download API and upstream Go git tags, commits newly discovered Go versions,
regenerates this page, and builds every pinned version and variant.
